exactly_identical.annotation:
IT IS PROHIBITED
FOR the court
TO make an order under subsection (8) with respect to an individual who is a child unless he is a parent of the child
exactly_identical.groundtruth:
IT IS PROHIBITED
FOR a court
TO make an order under subsection (8) with respect to an individual who is a child
UNLESS he is a parent of the child with respect to whom the order falling within subsection (1) was made. [source: https://www.legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/1989/41/section/11H]

same_norm_different_meaning.annotation:
IT IS PERMITTED
FOR the court
TO ask an officer of the Service or a Welsh family proceedings officer to report on matters relating to an individual's compliance with a child arrangements order
IF in any family proceedings the court makes a child arrangements order or an order varying a child arrangements order [source: 11H(1)]
same_norm_different_meaning.groundtruth:
IT IS PERMITTED
FOR a court
TO order any individual falling within subsection (3) to take such steps as may be specified in the order with a view to enabling the officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer to comply with the court's request under subsection (2).

same_norm_different_meaning.annotation:
IT IS PERMITTED
FOR the court
TO order any individual falling within subsection (3) to take steps to enable compliance with the court's request under subsection (2)
same_norm_different_meaning.groundtruth:
IT IS PROHIBITED
FOR a court
TO make a request under subsection (2) in relation to a child arrangements order that is an excepted order (within the meaning given by section 11B(4)).

only_in_annotations.annotation:
IT IS PERMITTED
FOR the court
TO ask an officer of the Service or a Welsh family proceedings officer to monitor compliance with a child arrangements order
IF in any family proceedings the court makes a child arrangements order or an order varying a child arrangements order [source: 11H(1)]

IT IS OBLIGATORY
FOR the officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer
TO comply with any request under subsection (2)

IT IS PROHIBITED
FOR the court
TO make a request under subsection (2) in relation to a child arrangements order that is an excepted order
